state.next-action: Phase `18` is now complete. The page-local composer model has been verified through focused Vitest coverage, localhost production build verification, and Playwright coverage for missing-route draft creation plus route-draft insert/reorder/media/publish flow. The last pass restored slot-focused media controls inside the Media tab, added in-tab slot selection for the selected block, aligned browser coverage with the real feature-flag contract for focused media copilot, and documented the pattern in `.planning/skills/page-composer-media-slot-surface.md`. The next autonomous pass should rehydrate task `11-05`: finish replacing the remaining Supabase customer-auth path with Clerk-hosted auth/social login and close the first-party Payload user + Clerk identity edge cases that are still marked in progress.
